SEARCH
Package client.view

Class ReservationCreateController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.ReservationCreateController
public class ReservationCreateController extends BaseController
Booking form for a new park reservation (INDIVIDUAL / FAMILY / GROUP visits).

Collects park, visitor id, date, optional time, party size and visit type, then sends CREATE_RESERVATION via NetworkService. On success it shows the server-issued confirmation code; on failure (e.g. no capacity for the chosen date) it surfaces the server's message.

Choosing GROUP reveals a Guide ID field and enforces the group cap of 15 client-side; the server re-checks both the guide and the cap, so these UI checks are convenience only.

Extends BaseController for navigation lifecycle parity with the other screens; it does not subscribe to push events (realtime push for reservations is a later session).

    Method
    Description
    private String
    formatVisitTime()
    Converts the compact 12-hour picker (hour 1–12, minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server/DB expect for visit_time — byte-identical to what the old picker sent.
    private void
    hideConfirmation()
    Hides and empties the payment confirmation panel.
    private void
    initialize()
    FXML lifecycle hook: loads parks, configures inputs, prefills for a visitor.
    private boolean
    isCapacityFailure(String message)
    Whether a failed CREATE_RESERVATION was rejected specifically for lack of capacity (the only case that offers the waiting list).
    private boolean
    isValidEmail(String email)
    Basic client-side email check (non-blank, contains an '@' and a '.') mirroring the server's isValidEmail.
    private boolean
    isValidPhone(String phone)
    Basic client-side phone check (at least ten digits, ignoring formatting) mirroring the server's isValidPhone.
    private void
    loadParks()
    Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS.
    private void
    onBook()
    Book-button handler: validates the form and sends CREATE_RESERVATION.
    private HBox
    paymentRow(String key, String value)
    Builds one key/value line for the payment confirmation panel.
    private void
    promptJoinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Asks the visitor whether to join the waiting list after a park-full rejection.
    private void
    showConfirmation(ReservationDTO created)
    Renders the payment confirmation for a freshly booked reservation from the server's ReservationDTO: reservation number, the server-computed total (price in cents formatted as shekels), and whether it was paid in advance or is due on arrival.
    private void
    showGuideField(boolean show)
    Shows or hides the guide-id field (relevant only to GROUP visits).

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservationCreateController

      public ReservationCreateController(NetworkService network, Session session)
      Creates the reservation-create controller.
      Parameters:
      network - the shared network service
      session - the current client session

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      private void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: loads parks, configures inputs, prefills for a visitor.

    • showGuideField

      private void showGuideField(boolean show)
      Shows or hides the guide-id field (relevant only to GROUP visits).
      Parameters:
      show - whether to reveal the guide field

    • formatVisitTime

      private String formatVisitTime()
      Converts the compact 12-hour picker (hour 1–12, minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server/DB expect for visit_time — byte-identical to what the old picker sent. The 12-hour mapping is: 12 AM → 00, 12 PM → 12, any other PM hour + 12; the minute is zero-padded (e.g. 2:30 PM → "14:30:00").
      Returns:
      the visit time formatted HH:mm:ss

    • loadParks

      private void loadParks()
      Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS. Each ReservationCreateController.ParkOption carries the park id (used by CREATE_RESERVATION), rendering only the name. On failure the dropdown stays empty and a toast explains why, so a booking can't be made against a stale hardcoded id.

    • onBook

      private void onBook()
      Book-button handler: validates the form and sends CREATE_RESERVATION.

    • isCapacityFailure

      private boolean isCapacityFailure(String message)
      Whether a failed CREATE_RESERVATION was rejected specifically for lack of capacity (the only case that offers the waiting list). Matches the server's "No capacity for that date …" message; any other failure is a plain error.
      Parameters:
      message - the server's failure message
      Returns:
      true if this was the capacity-full rejection

    • isValidEmail

      private boolean isValidEmail(String email)
      Basic client-side email check (non-blank, contains an '@' and a '.') mirroring the server's isValidEmail. A convenience guard for fast inline feedback — the server re-validates, so it is the real gate.
      Parameters:
      email - the trimmed email entered in the form
      Returns:
      true if it looks well-formed enough to send

    • isValidPhone

      private boolean isValidPhone(String phone)
      Basic client-side phone check (at least ten digits, ignoring formatting) mirroring the server's isValidPhone. Convenience guard for fast inline feedback — the server re-validates, so it is the real gate.
      Parameters:
      phone - the trimmed phone entered in the form
      Returns:
      true if it contains at least ten digits

    • promptJoinWaitlist

      private void promptJoinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
      Asks the visitor whether to join the waiting list after a park-full rejection. On confirm, re-sends the same booking inputs as JOIN_WAITLIST.
      Parameters:
      parkId - target park id
      visitorId - the visitor's national id
      visitDate - visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      visitTime - visit time HH:mm:ss, or null
      partySize - number of people in the party
      visitType - INDIVIDUAL, FAMILY, or GROUP
      guideId - guide id for GROUP visits, or null
      paidInAdvance - whether the visitor opts to pay up front
      email - contact email
      phone - contact phone

    • showConfirmation

      private void showConfirmation(ReservationDTO created)
      Renders the payment confirmation for a freshly booked reservation from the server's ReservationDTO: reservation number, the server-computed total (price in cents formatted as shekels), and whether it was paid in advance or is due on arrival.
      Parameters:
      created - the reservation returned by the server

    • paymentRow

      private HBox paymentRow(String key, String value)
      Builds one key/value line for the payment confirmation panel.
      Parameters:
      key - the line label
      value - the line value
      Returns:
      the key/value row

    • hideConfirmation

      private void hideConfirmation()
      Hides and empties the payment confirmation panel.
